name: Minerva, Scholar of the Sky
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天空賢者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンジェルセージ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミネルヴァ
desc: Each time a Counter Trap Card is activated, immediately after it resolves, this card gains 500 ATK, and if it does, and "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, add 1 Counter Trap with a different name from your GY to your hand.
mnst_eff: Each time a Counter Trap Card is activated, immediately after it resolves, this card gains 500 ATK, and if it does, and "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, add 1 Counter Trap with a different name from your GY to your hand.
eff: Each time a Counter Trap Card is activated, immediately after it resolves, this card gains 500 ATK, and if it does, and "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, add 1 Counter Trap with a different name from your GY to your hand.
